title: Muraat
content:
{{Top|leg}}
'''''Muraat''''' was a pair of [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[CR92a Assassin-class corvette|''Assassin''-class corvettes]]. The duo was part of reinforcements against the raid of [[XQ2 Platform]] [[RS-32]], ordered to arrive on [[Tan (title)|Tan]] [[Maarek Stele/Legends|Maarek Stele's]] request.

==Appearances==
*[[Star Wars: TIE Fighter (video game)|''Star Wars: TIE Fighter'']]

[[Category:CR92a Assassin-class corvettes|*]]
